capabilities.deployBehaviour: deploy source-defined code/config with invariant or local readiness checks
capabilities.migrationBehaviour: schema changes must be ordered in apps/platform-api/src/db/migrations and listed in data-and-migration-plan.json
capabilities.rollbackBehaviour: rollback preserves tenant data; forward-fix or guarded restore path is documented through backup/restore and migration lineage
capabilities.backupRestoreRelationship: tenant data is covered by backup/export/retention/legal-hold semantics; destructive changes require restore/export evidence
capabilities.partialFailureBehaviour: partial local failure returns typed error or readiness degraded state
capabilities.degradedMode: not_applicable or local degraded/error state as defined by readiness model
capabilities.recoveryAction: rerun proof/readiness after config/code fix; do not change UI semantics alone
alertConditions: Tenant identity (record + FQDN) readiness blocked or unavailable
proof or smoke check fails during promotion
